## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check . && mypy insta_dl`)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`docs/`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data in commits or logs
